{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Manufacturing Site Operations Manager",
  "description": "Dortlands is a construction company, dealing in residential and commercial buildings, real estate and concrete products manufacturing.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Manufacturing Site Operations Manager

Job Location: Kobape, Abeokuta - Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a results-driven Building blocks and concrete products Manufacturing Site Operations Manager. (Knowledge of demand and supply management is a plus).
	The ideal candidate will oversee daily plant operations, ensure efficient production planning, manage raw material supply, and align output with market demand.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage day-to-day operations on the site
	Plan production schedules based on demand forecasts
	Monitor and control supply of raw materials and inventory levels
	Ensure quality standards, safety compliance, and cost efficiency
	Supervise site staff and coordinate logistics for timely delivery
	Analyse demand trends to optimise production and minimise waste


Requirements


	Relevant qualification in Business management/Demand and Supply with 0-3 years of experience.
	Experience in block/concrete manufacturing or similar industry preferred but not essential as training will be provided.
	Knowledge of using business management software.
	Good leadership, organisational, and problem-solving skills
	Ability to work under pressure and meet production targets.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates to send their CV/application to: adedotun@dortlands.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Candidate&#39;s proximity to job location is essential due to operational reasons.",

Manufacturing Site Operations Manager Job at Dortlands




        
    

        
        Dortlands is a construction company, dealing in residential and commercial buildings, real estate and concrete products manufacturing.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Manufacturing Site Operations Manager

Job Location: Kobape, Abeokuta - Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a results-driven Building blocks and concrete products Manufacturing Site Operations Manager. (Knowledge of demand and supply management is a plus).
	The ideal candidate will oversee daily plant operations, ensure efficient production planning, manage raw material supply, and align output with market demand.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage day-to-day operations on the site
	Plan production schedules based on demand forecasts
	Monitor and control supply of raw materials and inventory levels
	Ensure quality standards, safety compliance, and cost efficiency
	Supervise site staff and coordinate logistics for timely delivery
	Analyse demand trends to optimise production and minimise waste


Requirements


	Relevant qualification in Business management/Demand and Supply with 0-3 years of experience.
	Experience in block/concrete manufacturing or similar industry preferred but not essential as training will be provided.
	Knowledge of using business management software.
	Good leadership, organisational, and problem-solving skills
	Ability to work under pressure and meet production targets.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates to send their CV/application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Candidate's proximity to job location is essential due to operational reasons.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Dortlands is a construction company, dealing in residential and commercial buildings, real estate and concrete products manufacturing.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Construction Project Manager
Job Location: Abeokuta, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a minimum of HND/BSc/MSc/MBA in a construction-related discipline, with a minimum of 1 year of verifiable experience in construction project management, with an ability to use a construction management software, ideal for a Project Manager role.
	The candidate must be of an ability to take up a leadership and ownership attitude, strong leadership to guide teams, exceptional communication for stakeholder alignment, and proactive problem-solving to manage risks and changes.
	This is a newly established company and the ideal candidate would be guided through and given internal training at the required areas.


Salary
N100,000 - N250,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to: adedotun@dortlands.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquires, send message via WhatsApp: +353899561222.",

Construction Project Manager Job at Dortlands




        
    

        
        Dortlands is a construction company, dealing in residential and commercial buildings, real estate and concrete products manufacturing.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Construction Project Manager
Job Location: Abeokuta, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Interested candidates should possess a minimum of HND/BSc/MSc/MBA in a construction-related discipline, with a minimum of 1 year of verifiable experience in construction project management, with an ability to use a construction management software, ideal for a Project Manager role.
	The candidate must be of an ability to take up a leadership and ownership attitude, strong leadership to guide teams, exceptional communication for stakeholder alignment, and proactive problem-solving to manage risks and changes.
	This is a newly established company and the ideal candidate would be guided through and given internal training at the required areas.


Salary
N100,000 - N250,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquires, send message via WhatsApp: +353899561222.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Loan Recovery Officer",
  "description": "B-Freedom Outsourcing - We are a professional collection service provider dedicated to assisting loan institutions in the swift and effective recovery of their bad debt.

We make calls to customers to pay their outstanding debts, send messages to customers, Guide customers through the payment process, persuade reluctant customers to make payments promptly, meet weekly and monthly targets, and provide proper and correct reports of work.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Loan Recovery Officer

Job Location: Ijaye, Abule Egba - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Details


	Contact customers to follow up on outstanding loan repayments.
	Negotiate and agree on feasible repayment plans.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an SSCE, FSLC, OND, NCE, HND, or Bachelor&#39;s Degree.
	Must have an Android phone to work with.
	Must be ready to work on-site.
	Training is done for newly recruited candidates.


Salary
N60,000 - N150,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: bfreedomoutsourcing@gmail.com using &quot;Loan Recovery&quot; as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquires; whatsapp 07040351811.&nbsp;",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-05",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "B-Freedom"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",

Loan Recovery Officer Job at B-Freedom Outsourcing




        
    

        
        B-Freedom Outsourcing - We are a professional collection service provider dedicated to assisting loan institutions in the swift and effective recovery of their bad debt.

We make calls to customers to pay their outstanding debts, send messages to customers, Guide customers through the payment process, persuade reluctant customers to make payments promptly, meet weekly and monthly targets, and provide proper and correct reports of work.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Loan Recovery Officer

Job Location: Ijaye, Abule Egba - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Details
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Contact customers to follow up on outstanding loan repayments.
	Negotiate and agree on feasible repayment plans.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an SSCE, FSLC, OND, NCE, HND, or Bachelor's Degree.
	Must have an Android phone to work with.
	Must be ready to work on-site.
	Training is done for newly recruited candidates.


Salary
N60,000 - N150,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Loan Recovery" as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquires; whatsapp 07040351811.

  "title": "Cashier",
  "description": "COISCO Integrated Resources and Petroleum Limited is a proudly indigenous Oil &amp; Gas company operating in Nigeria&rsquo;s downstream sector. Incorporated as a Limited Liability Company in 2006, the company commenced full operations in December 2007 and has since grown into a trusted name within the industry.

At COISCO, integrity, excellence, service, and respect form the core values that drive everything we do. We are committed to delivering quality products and services with excellence, ensuring that our operations consistently meet industry standards and customer expectations. Our business activities cut across haulage and retail sales, with product lines that include Petrol (PMS), Diesel (AGO), Kerosene (DPK), Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG), and Lubricants. Our head office is strategically located at KM 10, Onitsha&ndash;Owerri Road, Ogbaku, Imo State, serving as the operational hub for our expanding network.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Gariki, Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Cashier will be responsible for handling daily cash transactions, maintaining accurate financial records, reconciling sales, and supporting the station&rsquo;s accounting and operational processes with a high level of integrity and accountability.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive cash from Customer Service Attendants
	Accurately record daily sales and transactions
	Perform daily cash reconciliation and balancing
	Maintain proper documentation of financial records
	Assist in preparing financial and sales reports
	Ensure proper custody of cash and company valuables
	Ensure banking of cash and proper documentation
	Support accounting and administrative operations as assigned
	Ensure compliance with company financial policies and procedures


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc Degre in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or related discipline
	2 - 8 years of relevant experience in cashiering, accounting, or retail finance operations
	Strong numerical, reconciliation, and record-keeping skills
	Good knowledge of basic accounting principles
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other basic computer applications
	Strong integrity, accountability, and attention to detail
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Candidate must reside in Enugu.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@coiscostancosoil.com.ng or &nbsp;coiscorecruitment@gmail.comusing &quot;Cashier Application- Enugu&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Cashier Job at COISCO Integrated Resources and Petroleum Limited




        
    

        
        COISCO Integrated Resources and Petroleum Limited is a proudly indigenous Oil & Gas company operating in Nigeria’s downstream sector. Incorporated as a Limited Liability Company in 2006, the company commenced full operations in December 2007 and has since grown into a trusted name within the industry.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



At COISCO, integrity, excellence, service, and respect form the core values that drive everything we do. We are committed to delivering quality products and services with excellence, ensuring that our operations consistently meet industry standards and customer expectations. Our business activities cut across haulage and retail sales, with product lines that include Petrol (PMS), Diesel (AGO), Kerosene (DPK), Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG), and Lubricants. Our head office is strategically located at KM 10, Onitsha–Owerri Road, Ogbaku, Imo State, serving as the operational hub for our expanding network.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Gariki, Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Cashier will be responsible for handling daily cash transactions, maintaining accurate financial records, reconciling sales, and supporting the station’s accounting and operational processes with a high level of integrity and accountability.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive cash from Customer Service Attendants
	Accurately record daily sales and transactions
	Perform daily cash reconciliation and balancing
	Maintain proper documentation of financial records
	Assist in preparing financial and sales reports
	Ensure proper custody of cash and company valuables
	Ensure banking of cash and proper documentation
	Support accounting and administrative operations as assigned
	Ensure compliance with company financial policies and procedures


Requirements & Qualifications


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc Degre in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or related discipline
	2 - 8 years of relevant experience in cashiering, accounting, or retail finance operations
	Strong numerical, reconciliation, and record-keeping skills
	Good knowledge of basic accounting principles
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other basic computer applications
	Strong integrity, accountability, and attention to detail
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Candidate must reside in Enugu.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or  [email protected]using "Cashier Application- Enugu" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Mara Cruiz Limited is a fast-growing, purpose-driven company committed to manufacturing high-quality, effective haircare products, delivering real results, and creating meaningful impact for our customers and community.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Brand and Media Executive

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Strong graphic design skills with a professional portfolio demonstrating brand work, campaign visuals, and social media content.
	4 years of experience in brand design, creative content production, or a closely related role
	Hands-on experience producing video content, scripting, editing, and platform-native formatting.
	Proficiency in motion graphics and animation tools (After Effects, Premiere Pro, CapCut, or equivalent).
	Deep understanding of visual brand identity: typography, color theory, layout, and design systems.
	Creative eye and aesthetic sensibility &mdash; you can tell the difference between good and great, and you know how to close that gap.
	Experience using AI creative tools in a professional workflow.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV, Cover Letter and Portfolio to: recruitment@maracruizorganics.com using the Job Position as the subject for the email.",

Brand and Media Executive Job at Mara Cruiz Organics




        
    

        
        Mara Cruiz Organics is a Nigerian hair care brand specializing in natural, plant-based products designed for African hair textures. Mara Cruiz Limited is a fast-growing, purpose-driven company committed to manufacturing high-quality, effective haircare products, delivering real results, and creating meaningful impact for our customers and community.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Brand and Media Executive

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Strong graphic design skills with a professional portfolio demonstrating brand work, campaign visuals, and social media content.
	4 years of experience in brand design, creative content production, or a closely related role
	Hands-on experience producing video content, scripting, editing, and platform-native formatting.
	Proficiency in motion graphics and animation tools (After Effects, Premiere Pro, CapCut, or equivalent).
	Deep understanding of visual brand identity: typography, color theory, layout, and design systems.
	Creative eye and aesthetic sensibility — you can tell the difference between good and great, and you know how to close that gap.
	Experience using AI creative tools in a professional workflow.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV, Cover Letter and Portfolio to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject for the email.
